basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Raebareli Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Raebareli
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Raebareli (AIIMS Raebareli) Senior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 25 June 2026 on the official website aiimsrbl.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Raebareli Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 32 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Life Sciences with 2 years research experience, M.Tech in Biotechnology
qualification.details: M.Sc. degree in Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Microbiology/any stream of Life Sciences with at least two years of research experience, or M.Tech in Biotechnology.

salary_details.details: Rs 42000/- per month + HRA (as per rules)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Raebareli Senior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Raebareli Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Raebareli Senior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

AIIMS Raebareli Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. degree in Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Microbiology/any stream of Life Sciences with at least two years of research experience, or M.Tech in Biotechnology.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Raebareli Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 32 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Raebareli Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs 42000/- per month + HRA (as per rules)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Raebareli Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
AIIMS Raebareli Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Raebareli Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Raebareli Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the AIIMS Raebareli recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the AIIMS Raebareli recruitment is Senior Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Senior Research Fellow post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.Sc. degree in Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Life Sciences with at least two years of research experience, or an M.Tech in Biotechnology.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 32 years, with age relaxation applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs 42000/- per month plus HRA as per rules.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the AIIMS Raebareli office.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.
